products.name: Quadroin AUV
products.descriptor: Bionic penguin-inspired AUV for high-speed side-scan sonar and camera surveys

evidence.snippet:
● The EvoLogics Quadroin is an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) designed for high-resolution side-scan sonar and camera surveys.
Its bionic, penguin-inspired hull combines hydrodynamic efficiency with high maneuverability, allowing speeds of up to 10 knots while maintaining low energy consumption for extended subsea operations.

Building on these foundations, EvoLogics advanced the Quadroin platform from prototypes to serial production with optimized internal layout, updated propulsion and navigation systems, and expanded payload capacity. The current Quadroin generation features a side-scan sonar, full-HD camera, and onboard AI-processing for object recognition and collision avoidance, with advanced communication and navigation systems supporting complex underwater operations.

products.name: Poggy AUV
products.descriptor: Bionic Fin-Ray® AUV with dual flexible tails for low-speed inspection and monitoring

evidence.snippet:
● EvoLogics’ Poggy AUV is a cutting-edge autonomous underwater vehicle designed for advanced surveying, marine exploration and monitoring.
Inspired by nature, Poggy’s innovative bionic design leverages Fin-Ray® technology to deliver unmatched mobility and control in underwater environments.

The first Poggy prototypes were developed under the BONUS SEAMOUNT collaborative R&D project and debuted in 2019. Since then, the vehicle has undergone significant improvements in mechanical design and sensor integration, evolving into a market-ready platform.

products.name: Sonobot 5 USV
products.descriptor: Compact uncrewed surface vehicle for automated bathymetric surveys and monitoring

evidence.snippet:
The professional platform for hydrographic surveys
The Sonobot 5 is a compact uncrewed surface vehicle (USV) designed for automated bathymetry and monitoring in inland and coastal waters. Lightweight and tool-free to assemble, it delivers professional-grade data while remaining easy for a single operator to handle.

products.name: USBL Buoy
products.descriptor: Self-contained surface gateway with USBL transceiver, dual GNSS, and onboard PC for plug-and-play underwater asset tracking

evidence.snippet:
USBL Buoy
The EvoLogics USBL Buoy is a fully integrated, plug-and-play surface gateway for real-time tracking of underwater assets: all in one single, compact unit with GNSS and wireless connection to operator software.

products.name: PRO Series acoustic modems
products.descriptor: Full-size S2C underwater acoustic modem family for long-range telemetry and deep-water infrastructure

evidence.snippet:
PRO Series
The standard for performance and configurability. The PRO series offers the widest range of frequency options, transducer beam patterns, depth ratings and add-ons. It is the go-to choice for long-range telemetry and deep-water infrastructure.

products.name: MINI Series acoustic modems
products.descriptor: Compact lightweight S2C acoustic modems for AUV integration and size-sensitive applications

evidence.snippet:
MINI Series
Full performance in a compact, lightweight design. The MINI lineup features transducers for mid- and high-frequency operations, and targets size- and weight-sensitive applications, such as AUV integration and portable units.

products.name: TINY Series acoustic modems
products.descriptor: Smallest-form-factor S2C high-frequency acoustic modems for ultra-compact underwater vehicles

evidence.snippet:
TINY Series
Our smallest form factor is a 20% size reduction compared to the MINI-series. Designed for ultra-compact vehicles, the TINY series provides essential high-frequency communication without compromising on the robust S2C protocol stack.

products.name: OEM acoustic modems
products.descriptor: Housing-free S2C modem electronics boards with cable-mounted transducer for direct vehicle integration

evidence.snippet:
OEM & Integration
For seamless system integration, all EvoLogics modems are available as OEM builds (electronics boards + cable-mounted transducer) without housing. These are ideal for embedding directly into underwater vehicles, buoys, or custom machinery.
